name: Stolen Realm
short_description: Stolen Realm is a simultaneous turn-based tactical dungeon crawling looter with action RPG elements where you control up to 6 heroes, solo or through online co-op, venturing forth in adventures set in a high-fantasy, low-poly world.
detailed_description:
TURN‑BASED TACTICS MEETS ACTION RPG LOOTING

Stolen Realm is a fast-paced tactical dungeon crawler where explosive builds, meaningful loot, and simultaneous turn-based combat collide. Lead a party of up to six heroes through dangerous expeditions filled with monsters, treasure, and unpredictable events. Play solo or team up with friends in seamless online co‑op as you explore a vibrant, readable low‑poly fantasy world. Every dive into the Realm offers new challenges, new loot, and new ways to break the game in your favour.

FAST, SIMULTANEOUS TURN‑BASED COMBAT

Both sides act at the same time, keeping battles quick without losing tactical depth. Plan your moves, unleash your abilities, and watch the entire battlefield react at once. No waiting for long enemy turns. No downtime. Just tight, high‑impact encounters where positioning and synergy matter.

BUILD ANY HERO YOU CAN IMAGINE

There are no fixed classes. Choose from 300+ abilities across 10 flexible skill trees and craft a hero that fits your playstyle. Create classic archetypes or experiment with hybrids like:

  • A spell‑slinging assassin

  • A frost‑born priest

  • A shadow‑infused knight

  • Or something completely unhinged that shouldn’t work but absolutely does

LOOT THAT TRANSFORMS YOUR PLAYSTYLE

Discover 700+ items that do far more than raise your stats. Mythic weapons and relics unlock new mechanics, new synergies, and new strategies. Wield artifacts like:

  • Abbadon the Soul Crusher - raise slain enemies as skeletal allies

  • Bloodletter - a cursed blade that trades your lifeblood for devastating power

Every expedition opens the door to new combinations and new build possibilities.

CHOOSE YOUR PATH THROUGH THE REALM

Each adventure unfolds across a procedurally generated map where every decision shapes your run. After every battle you choose your next step, whether that’s diving into a treasure room, chasing a story event, visiting a merchant, gathering resources, or risking a dangerous encounter. Every expedition becomes its own story, defined by the choices you make and the luck you carry with you into the Realm.

ONLINE CO‑OP FOR UP TO 6 PLAYERS

Play solo or bring friends. Stolen Realm is built for co‑op strategy, with encounters that scale automatically and a drop‑in/drop‑out system that keeps the action flowing. Coordinate builds, chain abilities, and unleash devastating team combos.

WHAT PLAYERS & PRESS ARE SAYING

“The tactical depth of Divinity: Original Sin.” — GamesRadar+
“We’re losing our evenings to Stolen Realm.” — TheXboxHub
“A gorgeous looking game.” — PC Gamer
“You can do all sorts of weird stuff.” — Sacriel
“Straight to the point… no bullsh*t.” — Shroud
“It’s rad.” — Sequisha

KEY FEATURES

  • Online co‑op for up to 6 players

  • Fast, simultaneous turn‑based combat

  • 300+ abilities across 10 skill trees

  • 700+ lootable items that change how you play

  • Tactical hex‑based battlefields with interactive environments

  • 200+ enemy types with unique modifiers

  • Procedural adventures with branching paths and events

  • Campaign mode, Roguelike mode, and Hardcore permadeath
